action.content: I need to write a research proposal for a project on the effects of social media on the mental health of teenagers. Please only write short sentences, and don't use any commas in your entire response. Include at least five placeholder represented by square brackets, such as [website].

action.content:
Title: Exploring the Impact of Social Media on Teenagers' Mental Health

Background: Social media has become an integral part of modern life with [number] of teenagers using platforms like [Facebook] and [Instagram] daily.

Objectives:
- Investigate the relationship between social media usage and symptoms of depression and anxiety in teenagers.
- Examine the role of social comparison and cyberbullying in exacerbating mental health issues.
- Identify the most commonly used social media platforms among teenagers and their associated mental health risks.

Methodology:
- Conduct a mixed-methods study combining both qualitative and quantitative data collection methods.
- Recruit [number] of participants aged [age range] from [school/college] and [community] settings.
- Use [software] to analyze data from social media usage and mental health surveys.

Expected Outcomes:
- Quantitative data will provide insights into the prevalence of mental health issues among teenagers and their correlation with social media usage.
- Qualitative data will offer a deeper understanding of the experiences and perceptions of teenagers regarding social media and mental health.

Timeline:
- Literature review: [timeframe]
- Data collection: [timeframe]
- Data analysis: [timeframe]
- Report writing: [timeframe]

Expected Impact:
- The study will contribute to the existing body of research on the effects of social media on teenagers' mental health.
- The findings will inform the development of targeted interventions and policies to mitigate the negative effects of social media on teenagers.

Resources:
- [Funding agency] will provide [amount] of funding for the project.
- [University] will offer [resources] including [equipment] and [personnel].

Timeline for completion: [timeframe]
